title: URGENT CARE CLINIC - 211info
text: COMMUNITY HEALTH PARTNERS URGENT CARE CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers lab testing, medications and point of service testing such as basic urinalysis, blood glucose, strep throat testing, blood pressure screening, and pregnancy testing. Immunizations for seasonal flu and Tdap (tetanus, whooping cough) are also available. 945 Washington Way Suite 141 Longview, WA 98632 Eligibility: Uninsured adults age 18 and older Hours: Tuesday 9am-noon, Wednesday 5pm-8pm, Thursday noon-3pm Email (360) 442-4165 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 442-4165 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Columbia County Services: Blood Pressure Screening * People Without Health Insurance Flu Vaccines * People Without Health Insurance Pregnancy Testing * People Without Health Insurance Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening * People Without Health Insurance Urgent Care Centers * People Without Health Insurance Vaccine Information * People Without Health Insurance Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - VISION CLINIC HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - CHRONIC CARE MEDICAL CLINIC SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY HEALTH PARTNERS
